title: sertula indica
intro: Sertula indica, also known as the Indian knotweed, is a perennial herb native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sertula indica include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. Sertula indica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits.
